summary: Iteration 26: Basketball (NBA) Integration Testing Complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified - Soccer/Basketball toggle works correctly, subtitle changes to 'NBA' when Basketball selected, no Baseball references anywhere. Basketball prediction endpoint returns valid JSON with sport='basketball' field.
passed_tests: POST /api/basketball/search-teams returns teams with id and name for 'Lakers' query
POST /api/basketball/search-teams returns teams with id and name for 'Celtics' query
POST /api/basketball/predict returns valid prediction JSON with projectedValue, recommendation, confidenceScore, tacticalBreakdown, recentSamples, sport='basketball'
POST /api/scan-prop accepts sport='basketball' parameter without errors
POST /api/predict (soccer) still works - regression test passed
POST /api/auth/verify-whop returns verified=true for owner email josselj001@gmail.com
Frontend: Soccer/Basketball toggle visible in header
Frontend: Basketball button activates correctly when clicked
Frontend: Subtitle changes to 'Upload a NBA prop screenshot for instant AI analysis' when Basketball selected
critical_code_review_comments: basketball_predict.py: Well-structured multi-AI consensus engine with 5 AIs (gemini, gemini25, gpt4o, claude, grok) and first-3-wins pattern
basketball_utils.py: Clean separation from soccer utils, uses basketball.api-sports.io API
scan.py: Properly handles sport='basketball' parameter with separate prompt and resolution logic
App.js: Sport toggle (lines 821-836) correctly switches between Soccer and Basketball modes
api.js: basketballPredict() and basketballSearchTeams() functions properly implemented

test_credentials.owner_email: josselj001@gmail.com (auto-login via Whop verification, access_type: Owner)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Basketball (NBA) integration complete. App now supports two sports: Soccer and Basketball. Sport toggle in header switches between modes. Basketball prediction uses Lakers (ID: 145) and Celtics (ID: 133) as test teams. Basketball prediction takes ~30-50 seconds due to multi-AI consensus engine. Scan endpoint accepts sport='basketball' parameter. No baseball code remains anywhere in the codebase.

basketball_search_teams_endpoint.returns: teams array with id, name, logo

verified_features.no_baseball_references: Verified no baseball code in routes, server.py, or frontend
